account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.2 to align with Java 17 and Spring Framework 6.
account-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may work but prevents access to Spring Framework 6 features and is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.

account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
account-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17 as the minimum supported version; compiling with Java 11 will fail.

account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.3.x.
account-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; dependency resolution or runtime class conflicts will occur.

gateway-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.17 to 3.3.2 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
gateway-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; running Spring Boot 3.x on Java 11 results in runtime errors due to missing APIs and module system incompatibilities.

gateway-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 17 to match the target JDK.
gateway-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin will fail to compile if the source/target compatibility is set to 11 while using Java 17-specific features or if the build environment enforces JDK 17.

gateway-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version from 2021.0.2 to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.3.2.
gateway-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; dependency resolution will fail or runtime errors will occur due to API mismatches.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.x to support Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures or missing features on JDK 17.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 17 to align with the target JDK.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; compiling with Java 11 settings will fail.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version to match the new Spring Boot 3.x release train.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x, leading to dependency resolution conflicts or runtime classpath errors.

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace Feign client dependency with a service interface to decouple the controller from the HTTP client implementation.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.why_exists: The class ProductClient is no longer imported or used, likely removed or refactored in the broader migration; keeping the reference would cause a compile error if the class is deleted or package-private.

product-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.2 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
product-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed optimizations, and the migration target is explicitly Spring Boot 3.

product-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 17 to match the target JDK.
product-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; keeping java.version=11 would cause compilation failures or incorrect bytecode generation for Java 17 features.

product-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.3.2.
product-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; using the old version would cause dependency resolution conflicts or runtime errors due to API changes.

product-service/src/main/java/com/exampl.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
product-service/src/main/java/com/exampl.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / JDK 17+), causing compile errors for missing classes.
